assertions.expectation: Explains that surge upgrades require extra compute capacity (maxSurge creates NEW nodes before draining old ones)
assertions.reason: Response clearly explains the surge upgrade mechanism: 'Create surge node → drain old node → delete old node (needs extra quota)' and identifies this as the cause of the quota constraint

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting maxUnavailable >0 instead of relying on maxSurge (drains first, then creates — uses less quota)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends drain-first strategy with 'max-unavailable-upgrade 1' and explains it as 'Drain old node → create replacement node → delete old node (zero extra quota)'

assertions.expectation: Warns that maxUnavailable >0 means reduced capacity during upgrade — some pods won't have nodes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states the trade-off: 'You'll have temporary capacity loss (1 node at a time)' and mentions this as a consideration

assertions.expectation: Suggests temporarily scaling down non-critical deployments to free up quota for surge nodes
assertions.reason: Response provides detailed Option 2 with specific kubectl scale commands to scale down non-critical workloads and mentions combining this with drain-first approach

assertions.expectation: Mentions that reducing maxSurge to 1 minimizes extra quota needed (slower but fits within constraints)
assertions.reason: Response sets maxSurge to 0 (not 1) and doesn't discuss the option of using maxSurge=1 as a middle ground that would require minimal extra quota

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to update surge settings (maxSurge=0, maxUnavailable=1 for zero-extra-capacity mode)
assertions.reason: Response provides the exact gcloud command: 'gcloud container node-pools update' with '--max-surge-upgrade 0' and '--max-unavailable-upgrade 1'

assertions.expectation: Recommends doing the upgrade in off-peak hours when fewer pods are running
assertions.reason: Response does not mention timing the upgrade during off-peak hours as a strategy to minimize impact

assertions.expectation: Mentions requesting a temporary quota increase as a faster alternative to a permanent increase
assertions.reason: Response does not mention requesting a temporary quota increase as an alternative option, only acknowledges the week-long wait for approval mentioned in the prompt
